title: crotalaria polychroma
intro: Crotalaria polychroma, also known as the Desert Crotalaria or Rainbow Bush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria polychroma include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Crotalaria polychroma are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
